name: Chocolate Spritz Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shortening and sugar in a bowl. Beat in the egg and milk. Stir in the melted, cooled chocolate.
2. Gradually blend in the flour and salt.
3. Place the dough into a cookie press. Form cookies on an ungreased baking sheet. If desired, use a wreath-shaped cookie press disk to create wreaths and place one halved Glacéd cherry in the center of each.
4. Bake at 375°F for 8-10 minutes. Remove immediately from the oven and transfer to a cooling rack.
